Model TUNING:
choosing the best hyper parameters for the model to work best on unseen data..

CROSS VALIDATION:
it is a technique where to cross verify our model we continuosly change our training testing data for the verification of our model if it is working fine with different set of data.
We can use k fold cross validation:
where like value of k=5 and in first iteration starting 4 part goes to training and one for testing
in next iteration first two and 4th for training and 3th part testing and soo on for every possible combinations
REFER TITANIC MODEL FILE FOR THE IMPLEMENTATION OF CROSS VALIDATION


HYPER PARAMETER TUNING:
Har model me parameters hote hain jo model ki accuracy ko affect krte hain
jaise KNN me k ki value alag krne se alag values aati hain
Decision trees me depth hoti hai 
SVM me different kernals hote hain
So choosing the best parameters or tune them for the best model accuracy is HYPER PARAMETER TUNING

METHODS FOR HYPER PARAMETER TUNING:
1:Manual Search:
Manually different oarameters ko use krke best combination find out krna

2:Grid Search CV:
Isme kya hota hai ki jaise tumhara KNN hai uske possible parameters kya hain: K,weights(uniform, distance), metric(manhatten,euclidian)
toh ab hum possible combinations banaynge in a grid jaise k=3 ke liye uniform aur manhatten le liya
phir 3 ke liye distance aur euclidian le liya aise
aur ab cross validation ki value decide krnge  e.g 5 means 5sections create krnge of dataset and sab pe accuracy nikal ke average find krnge.

3:Randomized Search:
Very similar to grid search cv
only difference is that to reduce the complexity and size of the grid we randomply select some values of grid and do the corss validation
